description: Rapide Quick Set Mortar is a quality pre-mixed formulation ideal for jobs requiring a fast drying time. Designed for use on a wide range of small mortar jobs. Just add water and it's ready to go. Approx 2kg Rapide Quick Set Mortar Read Labels before Use Ideal for repairing drains, steps, setting posts, grouting bolts, repointing brickwork and general repairs.
